description: A dental crown, also called a cap, is a covering that completely encases a damaged tooth to restore its original shape, size, strength, and appearance.
treatment_process: Tooth preparation by removing outer damaged structure
Custom crown fabrication in dental lab
Permanent crown placement and bite adjustment
durability: Long-lasting with proper care and regular dental check-ups
aftercare: Use nightguard if recommended for teeth grinding
notes: Some temporary sensitivity after crown placement is normal and usually improves within a few weeks.
